notableEvents.label: Junior Caminero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Kody Clemens. Chandler Simpson out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Larnach reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Junior Caminero. Brooks Lee to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Nick Fortes batting, Taylor Walls picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, second baseman Luke Keaschall.

notableEvents.label: Nick Fortes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Fortes grounds out, third baseman Royce Lewis to first baseman Kody Clemens.

notableEvents.label: Matt Wallner GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Matt Wallner grounds into a double play, second baseman Ben Williamson to shortstop Taylor Walls to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Kody Clemens out at 2nd. Matt Wallner out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Matt Wallner rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Matt Wallner grounds into a double play, second baseman Ben Williamson to shortstop Taylor Walls to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Kody Clemens out at 2nd. Matt Wallner out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Trevor Larnach reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Larnach reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Junior Caminero. Brooks Lee to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Hunter Feduccia singles on a soft ground ball to pitcher Simeon Woods Richardson. Hunter Feduccia to 2nd. Hunter Feduccia advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Simeon Woods Richardson.
